message:
🐛 Fix stack selector scroll list going empty and jumping (#786)

Removed aggressive CSS containment properties (contain: 'layout style paint'
on items, contain: 'layout' + willChange: 'scroll-position' on container)
that prevented proper repainting during scroll, causing the list to appear
empty until items were forced to repaint ~1s later.

Also removed overscroll-contain and sticky cluster headers that contributed
to jerky scroll behavior with few items per cluster group.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
